allow: Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=15 root@188.166.253.203 "tmux capture-pane -p -t crypto -S -500 2>/dev/null | tail -200")

Bash(ssh root@188.166.253.203 "cd /root/Crypto_Sniper && tmux new-session -d -s crypto 'while true; do python3 main.py; echo \\"[restart] $\(date\) exit \\$?\\"; sleep 5; done' && echo 'Started tmux session crypto'")
Bash(ssh root@188.166.253.203 "sleep 5 && ps aux | grep python | grep main | grep -v grep")
Bash(ssh root@188.166.253.203 "ls /root/Crypto_Sniper/.env 2>/dev/null && echo 'found' || echo 'not found'; ls /root/.env 2>/dev/null && echo 'root found' || true")
Bash(ssh root@188.166.253.203 "kill -SIGTERM \\$\(ps aux | grep 'python3 main.py' | grep -v grep | awk '{print \\$1}'\) 2>/dev/null && echo 'restarting'")
Bash(ssh root@188.166.253.203 "kill -SIGTERM \\$\(ps aux | grep 'python3 main' | grep -v grep | awk 'NR==1{print \\$1}'\) && echo ok")
Bash(ssh root@188.166.253.203 "cd /root/Crypto_Sniper && git pull origin main 2>&1")
Bash(ssh root@188.166.253.203 "sudo systemctl restart crypto-bot && sleep 3 && sudo systemctl status crypto-bot --no-pager | head -20")

Bash(ssh root@188.166.253.203 'cd /root/Crypto_Sniper && python3 -c "import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect\(\\"trading_bot.db\\"\); conn.row_factory=sqlite3.Row; cur=conn.cursor\(\); cur.execute\(\\"SELECT order_id,symbol,side,amount,entry_price,stop_loss,take_profit,strategy_source,bootstrap_source FROM positions WHERE closed=0 OR closed IS NULL ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10\\"\); [print\(dict\(r\)\) for r in cur.fetchall\(\)]; conn.close\(\)"')
